category_sources: source_facts.description says Apache CouchDB is a database server; official Apache CouchDB site describes CouchDB as a database with HTTP/JSON API and replication.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description uses Apache CouchDB; official Apache CouchDB homepage and documentation use Apache CouchDB.
docs_sources: Official CouchDB documentation is hosted at docs.couchdb.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Apache CouchDB homepage links to CouchDB on GitHub, and the apache/couchdb repository is the official source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Apache CouchDB database server; official Apache CouchDB site and docs describe document storage, HTTP/JSON API, and replication.
